**Proposed lesson title:**

**Which phase and module does it belong in, and where in the sequence?**

**What gap does it fill?**
<!-- What can a learner NOT do after completing the current curriculum that they COULD do after this lesson? -->

**Outline (3–5 bullet points covering the main concepts):**

**Resources you'd use (papers, docs, blog posts):**

**Are you willing to write this lesson?**
- [ ] Yes, I'll write a full draft
- [ ] I can write an outline and need a co-author
- [ ] I'm proposing the idea only
